title: Choose Your Experience
subtitle: From an authentic culinary masterclass to adrenaline-fueled dunes — discover the soul of Agadir.

services.name: Cooking Masterclass
services.description: An exclusive culinary journey through the flavours of Morocco. Visit the vibrant Souk to handpick fresh vegetables and spices, then learn the ancestral art of Tagine and Couscous alongside a traditional chef. Savour your creations with dessert and mint tea at the Kasbat Souss artisan complex — surrounded by 100% handmade Amazigh crafts.

services.name: Quad Biking
services.description: Feel the raw adrenaline as you tear across the golden desert dunes. This 2-hour off-road expedition puts you in control — wind in your face, sun on your back, and endless horizons ahead. Transport included.

services.name: Buggy Off-Road
services.description: Conquer the desert in a brand-new, powerful buggy. 2 hours of pure off-road exhilaration across majestic sand dunes and spectacular desert trails. Adrenaline meets breathtaking scenery. Transport included.

services.name: Horse Riding
services.description: Ride like the free Amazigh souls through the mystical Aghroud forests and across the legendary Souss River. Capture golden-hour photos, then savour mint tea and traditional sweets at the Kasbat Souss. Perfect for beginners and experienced riders alike.

services.name: Camel Trekking
services.description: A magical desert journey at a gentle pace. Traverse the ancient Aghroud forest trails, photograph the shimmering Souss River, and arrive at Kasbat Souss for mint tea and traditional sweets. Comfortable, unforgettable, and steeped in Amazigh heritage.
